events.name: Bayer Leverkusen at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Champions Bayer Leverkusen needed a second-half goal by in-form forward Patrik Schick to edge mid-table hosts Union Berlin 2-1 in the Bundesliga on Saturday and climb to third spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Schick scores again as Leverkusen win at Union

video.headline: Patrik Schick slots in the goal for Bayer Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Patrik Schick slots in the goal for Bayer Leverkusen) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich scored an 85th-minute equaliser through in-form Jamal Musiala to rescue a 1-1 draw at Borussia Dortmund in the Klassiker on Saturday and go seven points clear at the top.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern's Musiala scores late goal to snatch 1-1 draw at Borussia Dortmund

video.headline: Jamal Musiala heads home the equalizer for Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jamal Musiala heads home the equalizer for Bayern) 2024/11/30 ESHEET
